sourceMovie.title: Hunting Grounds
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Hunting Grounds (2025) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Point Blank
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hunting Grounds clicked for you, Point Blank (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hunting Grounds?
faq.answer: Try Point Blank, Dangerous, Cleaner—each shares DNA with Hunting Grounds while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hunting Grounds?
faq.answer: Hunting Grounds (2025) is best described as Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hunting Grounds worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
